dev.source: current append-only usage logs read during snapshot build

heldout.source: current append-only usage logs read during snapshot build

verdict.interpretation: negative favours Gemini; positive favours Claude

severity.interpretation: negative favours Gemini; positive favours Claude

action.interpretation: negative favours Gemini; positive favours Claude

external_replication.design: one frozen A2 round per model; independently sourced cases; four per evidence condition

presets.title: Correctly calibrated strong case
presets.teaching: Decisive evidence, confident verdict, in band — the system is not simply pessimistic.

presets.title: Over-triage on insufficient evidence
presets.teaching: The dominant failure: a confident malicious call the evidence does not support.

presets.title: Counter case — benign context should lower it
presets.teaching: Decisive benign context is present, yet the decision does not come down.

presets.title: Under-triage of a strong case (UQP-001)
presets.teaching: The mirror failure: decisive evidence present, decision too low.

presets.title: High-consequence action routed for human approval
presets.teaching: The runtime policy cannot know if the verdict is right — but it can refuse to let a disruptive action fire unreviewed.

presets.title: Passes runtime validation, fails A4
presets.teaching: The honest limit of a ground-truth-free layer: internally consistent, well-formed, correctly cited — and still miscalibrated.
